rationale: The candidate studies reciprocity in networks with arbitrary degree sequences and correlations, focusing on structural properties of graphs (degree distributions and correlations) rather than the branching-process machinery central to the query and hypothetical (generating functions, critical branching ratios, and cascading sequences). Its object—networks with degree correlations—is the same domain as the query (graph theory), not the seismological aftershock cascades described in the hypothetical.
